title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Zoro, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, that was one of my strongest techniques!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A swordsman beaten by his own sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I-I can't sell it, you moron!! If you end up dead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your blood would be on my hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Risking yourself to save a sword?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a relief... it didn't fall off the island,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SENSE!! Please let me have her sword!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: stronger for the both of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: strong enough that my name reaches up to the heavens!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am going to be the world's greatest swordsman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that white Katana of yours is the wado Ichimonji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was forged by the same man that made enma!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't have time to think about it before, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did a sword from wano wind up in the east blue?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
